data.body: PROGRESS CHECKPOINT (2026-06-16, session handoff). DONE (4/9 children, all pushed to main): 744e ADR (docs/config.md), 252e typed Config (stdlib dataclass, full key inventory, coerce/validate/alias/unknown-warn), 43a0 loader (tomllib + upward/XDG discovery + sparse-merge layering CLI>env>project>user>defaults), fe78 routed the verify gate + display_mode through load_config (fail-closed preserved; FIXED a malformed-pyproject fail-OPEN; dropped DSO WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE; added tests/conftest XDG isolation for portability). load_config is now the unified entry point. Full offline suite green (1877). REMAINING: c647 (rebar config/--show-config), 83e6 (back-compat alias window + deprecation warnings), e211 (perf — IMPORTANT: check if _display_mode is called per-ticket in list renders; if so add memoization + dedup the pyproject double-parse), f81a (docs sweep), and the 4 env-var tasks EV-1..4 under 60ce (sync rename, dead-var removal, user-var renames, REBAR_LLM_RUNNER derivation). DEFER: SESSION_ID (83f2 needs user approval). next-batch top is EV-2 (P1) but it's a large multi-file removal; e211/c647 are more tractable. Loop assignee: config-loop.
